Bradley & May

Bradley & May

Pendrell Hall

28 June 2021 (Hopefully!!!)

Details

We are to be Married!

28 June 2021

at

Pendrell Hall, Codsall Wood, Wolverhampton WV8 1QP

Links for travel

Order of the Day

13:30 - Ceremony Begins

14:15 - Reception with Drinks

15:45 - Dinner and Toasts

17:00 - Band & Bad Dancing

The Menu (hopefully..)

Starter

Spiced Beef Brisket with Onion Bhaji Garnished with pickled Cucumber, Carrot and mint Riata

(V) Goats Cheese & Red Onion Tart on Mixed Leaves with Onion Chutney

Main

Breast of Chicken, wrapped in Pancetta, Mushrooms with a Marsala Wine Sauce, Dauphinoise Potatoes, Carrots/Honey Glazed, Tender stem Broccoli

(V/Ve) Roast Mediterranean Vegetable Tomato Risotto with White wine and Herbs

Desert

Mini Lemon Posset, Mini Crème Brulee & Mini Chocolate Brownie

Evening

Pulled Pork Shoulder served in a Bap with Spicy Tomato Relish and Sweet Apple Sauce

(V/Ve) Spicy Bean Burger in a Bap

Accommodation

The venue has a number of rooms available for the night of the wedding, which can be booked by clicking the button below. You will need a code which we will send you, once you've confirmed you are coming.

RSVP

Let us know you're coming, and any dietary or other requirements you have.
